case_title: CACH, LLC VS. RICHARD A LONG et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-27-2012 CONTINUED TO FEB-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-27-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
